title: a-C1: extend FabExtractKnowledge schema with 4 optional fields (intent_clues / tech_stack / impact / must_read_if) + skill prompts fill
scope: api-contracts schema + extract-knowledge handler + frontmatter writer + archive/import skill prompts
description: KB entries currently have intent_clues / tech_stack / impact / must_read_if implicit in description prose, costing the LLM extra read to triage relevance. Add four optional structured fields to FabExtractKnowledge*Schema (input + output + annotations), persist them to frontmatter on write, and update the fabric-archive + fabric-import skill prompts to teach the LLM how to infer them from raw observations.

files.change: Add 4 optional string-array (or string) fields: intent_clues, tech_stack, impact, must_read_if; document semantics in .describe()
Pass-through the 4 new fields into emitted .md frontmatter (keep optional — omit when absent)
Add a section instructing the LLM to populate intent_clues / tech_stack / impact / must_read_if from observed evidence; provide one tiny example

implementation: Read api-contracts.ts to find FabExtractKnowledge*Schema definitions
Add the 4 optional fields to all three schemas + corresponding describe() copy
Read extract-knowledge.ts and locate the frontmatter assembly site; thread through the new fields
Update fabric-archive + fabric-import skill markdown prompts with the new field semantics + 1 worked example each
Add unit tests for: (a) emit with all 4 fields, (b) emit with none, (c) emit with subset

reference.pattern: Existing optional frontmatter fields (tags / id / slug)
reference.examples: Mirror how `tags: string[]` was originally added

criteria: Schema accepts all 4 new fields as optional with describe text
Emitted .md frontmatter contains the 4 fields when supplied, omits when undefined
Both skill prompts mention the 4 new fields
Unit tests pass for present/absent/subset cases

rationale.chosen_approach: Optional fields (additive, non-breaking) — let LLM populate where useful, no migration needed for older entries
alternatives_considered: Required fields (rejected: forces migration of all existing entries)
Single combined `metadata: object` field (rejected: lower structure → worse LLM relevance scoring)
rationale.tradeoffs: Schema surface grows by 4 fields — manageable; describe copy must be tight

manual_checks: Run fabric-archive skill, supply intent_clues=['session-start'], verify .md frontmatter has the field
success_metrics: LLM populates fields ≥30% of the time after skill update
